{{Quote|Depends on what you think I'm ''aiming'' at, Ace! I wanted that ''planetoid'' behind you!|Han Solo|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 22">[[Star Wars (1977) 22|''Star Wars'' (1977) 22]]</ref>}}
'''Ace''' was the nickname [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] gave to a [[Human/Legends|Human]] contender in [[The Big Game]]. Ace was not a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]]. He had long, brown hair, pale skin, and wore a silver bodysuit. Ace mocked Solo for missing him with a [[needle ray]], but Solo was actually aiming for an explosive [[Planetoid (weapon)|planetoid]], which detonated and killed Ace.

==Appearances==
